---
title: "Applied Computer Vision Systems Engineering"
subtitle: "From image processing algorithms to reliable visual-localization systems"
format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    toc: false
execute:
  eval: false
  echo: true
---

This course bridges academic computer vision and production engineering through one concrete project: a visual-localization system that can be configured, tested, replayed, evaluated, observed, and debugged.

The main question is:

```text
How do we transform computer vision algorithms into scalable and reliable production systems?
```

## Semester Arc

| Week | Focus | Link |
|---|---|---|
| 0 | Course architecture and local setup | [Course Setup](lessons/00_course_setup.html) |
| 1 | Image processing toolkit | [Image Processing Toolkit](lessons/01_image_processing_toolkit.html) |
| 2 | Geometry and camera systems | [Geometry And Camera Systems](lessons/02_geometry_camera_systems.html) |
| 3 | Localization and state estimation | [Localization State Estimation](lessons/03_localization_state_estimation.html) |
| 4 | Production architecture | [Production Architecture](lessons/04_production_architecture.html) |
| 5 | Failure and reliability | [Failure And Reliability](lessons/05_failure_reliability.html) |
| 6 | Data and replay workflows | [Data Workflows](lessons/06_data_workflows.html) |
| 7 | Evaluation and observability | [Evaluation And Observability](lessons/07_evaluation_observability.html) |
| 8 | Automation and local skills | [Automation And Local Skills](lessons/08_automation_local_skills.html) |
| 9-12 | Final project | [Final Project](lessons/09_final_project.html) |
| Appendix | Optional PyTorch segmentation workflow | [Segmentation Appendix](lessons/90_optional_segmentation_mlflow.html) |

## Project Arc

```{mermaid}
%%| eval: true
%%| echo: false
flowchart LR
  A[Image processing] --> B[Geometry]
  B --> C[Localization estimator]
  C --> D[Failure replay]
  D --> E[Evaluation metrics]
  E --> F[MLflow observability]
  F --> G[Local engineering skills]
```

## Core Commands

Install dependencies:

```bash
uv sync --dev
```

Run tests:

```bash
uv run pytest
```

Run a baseline replay:

```bash
uv run python localize.py --config configs/localization.yaml --no-mlflow
```

Run a failure scenario with MLflow logging:

```bash
uv run python localize.py --config configs/localization.yaml --scenario gps_drift
```
